preReview.title: New York City FC contra Nashville SC: Jansen preparado para enfrentar de frente '10 finales'
preReview.description: New York City FC busca aumentar sus posibilidades de terminar en los playoffs cuando se enfrenten a sus rivales de la Conferencia Este, Nashville SC.

preReview.title: New York City FC v Nashville SC: Jansen pronto ad affrontare '10 finali' a testa alta
preReview.description: Il New York City FC cerca di aumentare le proprie possibilità di finire nei playoff affrontando i rivali della Eastern Conference Nashville SC.

preReview.title: New York City FC v Nashville SC: Jansen prepared to tackle '10 finals' head on
preReview.description: New York City FC are looking to boost their chances of finishing in the playoffs when they take on Eastern Conference rivals Nashville SC.

preReview.title: New York City FC x Nashville SC: Jansen preparado para enfrentar '10 finais' de frente
preReview.description: New York City FC está procurando aumentar suas chances de chegar aos playoffs ao enfrentar seus rivais da Conferência Leste, Nashville SC.

preReview.title: New York City FC contre Nashville SC : Jansen prêt à affronter '10 finales' de front
preReview.description: New York City FC cherche à augmenter ses chances de se qualifier pour les playoffs en affrontant les rivaux de la Conférence Est, Nashville SC.

preReview.title: New York City FC gegen Nashville SC: Jansen bereit, '10 Endspiele' direkt anzugehen
preReview.description: New York City FC will seine Chancen auf die Playoff-Qualifikation erhöhen, wenn sie gegen den Eastern Conference-Rivalen Nashville SC antreten.

preReview.title: نيويورك سيتي إف سي ضد ناشفيل إس سي: يانسن مستعد لمواجهة "10 نهائيات" مباشرة
preReview.description: يسعى فريق نيويورك سيتي إف سي لتعزيز فرصهم في إنهاء الموسم بالتصفيات عندما يلتقون بمنافسيهم في المؤتمر الشرقي، ناشفيل إس سي.

preReview.title: New York City FC contra Nashville SC: Jansen preparado para enfrentar '10 finais' de frente
preReview.description: O New York City FC está buscando melhorar suas chances de terminar nos playoffs quando enfrentarem os rivais da Conferência Leste Nashville SC.

QAData.question: Who won between New York City FC and Nashville SC on Sun, 17 Aug 2025 21:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New York City FC won 2–1 over Nashville SC on Sun, 17 Aug 2025 21:00:00 GMT.
